title: Oil falls amid concerns of higher OPEC supply
section_path: Oil falls amid concerns of higher OPEC supply
section_path_text: Oil falls amid concerns of higher OPEC supply
summary:
Main
Commodity markets pushed lower as a stronger USD weighed on investor appetite. Expectations of further increases in OPEC output pushed oil prices lower. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-09-05 111925.png | assets/2025-09-05_oil-falls-amid-concerns-of-higher-opec-supply_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_448bcdb28cb0.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil remained under pressure amid concerns of rising OPEC supply.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Commodity markets pushed lower as a stronger USD weighed on investor appetite. Expectations of further increases in OPEC output pushed oil prices lower.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil remained under pressure amid concerns of rising OPEC supply. The group is due to meet on Sunday to discuss its current unwinding of voluntary cuts made by eight members in 2024.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: US crude oil inventories are rebuilding earlier than in previous years following the driving season, suggesting demand is not as strong as originally suspected. This may see OPEC hold back from rising output further on October.
